description:
c4_complex sample shows warnings:
- dimensions: SVG size differs significantly (1083x768 vs 1640x960)
- rect count: expected 24, got 6 (75% difference)
- z_order: text elements rendered before shapes

Visual similarity: 31.5%, structural: 67.4%. Check src/diagrams/c4/ against reference.
title: c4: Dimensions, rect count, and z-order issues
